task_description: Wire Phase 70-72 packages together with integration tests proving each gate: Universal Tool Layer multi-app execution (Phase 70), Voice-to-deploy + durable automation (Phase 71), and Phone-free agentic living across 5+ apps (Phase 72).

verification.summary: All 4 packages typecheck clean. All 164 tests pass (55 quant-tools, 24 quant-codex, 28 quant-automate, 57 voice-first-os). Integration tests exercise real code paths with meaningful assertions.
